data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: RISKY
REASON: Extensive missing data (odds for O2.5/BTTS/FH O0.5, model predictions, standings, H2H, injuries) severely limits analysis. América Mineiro's high xG (1.42) conflicts with their abysmal PPG (0.17) and bookmaker odds.
CONCLUSION: No Bet / Skip
